name: PDF to Podcast
description: PDF-to-podcast pipeline with FastAPI services, local PDF extraction, NVIDIA-backed agent scripting, ElevenLabs TTS, Redis, MinIO, Jaeger and a Gradio frontend.

minimum.notes: Default stack runs with hosted NVIDIA and ElevenLabs APIs. Docker images are large because the PDF model worker is CUDA-capable.

requiredTools.label: Git
requiredTools.installHint: Windows: winget install Git.Git. Linux: install git from your package manager.

requiredTools.label: Bash
requiredTools.installHint: Windows: install Git Bash. Linux: bash is usually preinstalled.

requiredTools.label: Docker
requiredTools.installHint: Install Docker Desktop on Windows/macOS or Docker Engine on Linux.

requiredTools.label: Docker Compose v2
requiredTools.installHint: Install Docker Compose v2 plugin or Docker Desktop.

runtimeModes.label: Hosted API mode
runtimeModes.description: Uses hosted NVIDIA endpoints for script generation and ElevenLabs for TTS. API keys are needed for full podcast generation; health checks run without real keys.

setupNotes: Install clones the source into deploy/pdf-to-podcast.
Run delegates to the provider setup.sh --up script and records the auto-selected frontend/API ports.
The app defaults to the Gradio frontend on port 7860 when available.
